decisions.decision: Treat step 5 as a named-test backend gate that spans the smallest exposure-specific slice across `BayesMarketApiUnitTests`, `BayesMarketEventTradeTests`, `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests`, `BayesMarketApiConcurrencyTests`, and `BayesMarketApiIntegrationTests`, instead of rerunning the whole file or dropping either HTTP layer. The slice should cover the root service index, direct route `404`/`405`, risk-only and fully pruned `404`, buy/sell netting, idempotent replay, over-limit side effects, threaded HTTP parity, and HTTP resolution cleanup reads.
alternatives_rejected: Rerun all of `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` as the only step-5 gate.
Limit the gate to `BayesMarketEventTradeTests` and `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` only.
Treat the threaded HTTP class as the only transport-layer proof and drop the plain integration exposure assertions.

decisions.decision: Keep `routes.accounts` frozen as the exact ordered bare-path list `["/v1/accounts/{id}/risk", "/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure"]`, treating both membership and order as part of the public service-index contract.
alternatives_rejected: Assert only unordered membership while leaving order unspecified.
Switch the account service-index entries to method-qualified strings such as `GET /v1/accounts/{id}/exposure`.

decisions.decision: Treat only response-local `meta.timestamp` as intentionally dynamic during step 5 tightening. Keep `account.exposure` payloads and structured `404`/`405` `error.details` as exact-equality contracts, and keep parity-style HTTP assertions focused on the stable `account` body when separate reads naturally produce different timestamps.
alternatives_rejected: Loosen the whole `meta` envelope or other payload fields beyond `meta.timestamp`.
Downgrade stable error details to partial assertions such as checking only `error.code`.

decisions.decision: Preserve projection-local existence semantics for `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure`: never-traded accounts, risk-only accounts, accounts fully pruned by offsetting sells, and accounts fully pruned by market resolution should all continue to return `404 account_not_found` rather than `200` with `positions: []`.
alternatives_rejected: Treat any account present in another read model as existing for `/exposure`.
Return `200` with an empty exposure document after final-position cleanup.

decisions.decision: Strengthen the over-limit EventTrade regression to assert that the public `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` read is unchanged before and after the rejected trade, so the side-effect-free contract is frozen at the route level in addition to the existing internal-state snapshot checks.
alternatives_rejected: Treat the internal `COMMANDS`/`EVENTS`/`IDEMPOTENCY_KEYS`/`ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` snapshot proof as sufficient on its own.
Move the limit-breach invariant entirely into transport-layer tests.

steps.task: Run a focused named-test slice in `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` covering `BayesMarketApiUnitTests::{test_root_route_returns_service_index,test_account_exposure_requires_known_account,test_account_exposure_route_returns_404_for_risk_only_account,test_account_exposure_route_is_method_not_allowed_for_post,test_market_resolution_prunes_last_live_exposure_and_exposure_route_returns_404}`, `BayesMarketEventTradeTests::{test_event_trade_exposure_route_reflects_accepted_buy_then_sell_netting,test_event_trade_position_limit_exceeded_is_side_effect_free_and_idempotency_key_remains_reusable,test_event_trade_replays_idempotent_submission}`, `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests::{test_get_account_exposure_serializes_lexically_sorted_positions_and_account_timestamp,test_get_account_exposure_raises_404_for_missing_or_fully_pruned_projection,test_settle_market_account_exposure_prunes_resolved_market_rows_and_updates_survivors}`, `BayesMarketApiConcurrencyTests::{test_account_exposure_threaded_http_happy_path_matches_direct_route_after_event_trade,test_account_exposure_threaded_http_unknown_account_returns_structured_error,test_account_exposure_threaded_http_rejects_non_get_methods}`, and `BayesMarketApiIntegrationTests::{test_market_resolve_http_settles_account_exposure,test_account_exposure_http_unknown_account_returns_structured_error,test_account_exposure_http_rejects_non_get_methods}`.

If the focused slice exposes assertion drift, tighten `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` around the intended public contract rather than widening production behavior: keep the exact ordered service-index list, exact `account.exposure` bodies, exact structured `404`/`405` details, and only dynamic `meta.timestamp` handling.

Extend the over-limit EventTrade regression to capture `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` before and after the rejected submission, proving that the public read surface remains unchanged while the existing internal immutability assertions continue to guard `COMMANDS`, `EVENTS`, `IDEMPOTENCY_KEYS`, and `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE`.

Re-run the same focused backend slice after any edits and confirm the final gate still freezes projection-local `404 account_not_found` semantics for risk-only, offset-sell-pruned, and resolution-pruned accounts across both direct and HTTP coverage.
